_comment: Data for source_file_checks.check_heading_case (sentence-case heading guard). 'proper_nouns' are mixed-case tokens (names, brands, eponyms) allowed to stay capitalized mid-heading; all-caps acronyms (CSS, LLMs), model/version names with digits (GPT-2-XL), and ACRONYM-prefixed compounds (POWER-seeking) are recognized automatically and need not be listed. 'allowed_headings' are whole headings exempted because they are titles of cited works, product/feature names, or quoted terms that legitimately keep title case. See design.md ('Markdown syntax' checklist).
allowed_headings: "Reward hacking" and "Reward≠OT" refer to different meanings of "reward"
A First Course in Ordinary Differential Equations
A Friendly Approach to Functional Analysis
I made a few mistakes in Reward≠OT
Underestimating books in the Chinese Room
What you can find in _The Pond_
Why did people misremember Reward≠OT as conflicting with "reward hacking" results?
